2022-23 Sacramento State Hornets Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 14-18 (7-11, 6th in Big Sky MBB)

Coach: David Patrick

PS/G: 66.1 (317th of 363)

PA/G: 67.8 (106th of 363)

SRS: -4.63 (226th of 363)

SOS: -1.60 (178th of 363)

ORtg: 102.3 (229th of 363)

DRtg: 105.0 (266th of 363)
